_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of administrative and office procedures and systems such as word processing, managing files and records, stenography and transcription, designing forms, and workplace terminology.
comments: General office administration is outside WIDAI scope. WIDAI covers data/AI professional competencies, not administrative office procedures. No gap — intentionally out of scope.
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

strength_justification.methodology: No computational scoring — element determined out of WIDAI scope during semantic analysis
